description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with a youthful appearance, featuring light pink twin-braided hair tied with large bows and a headband. The doll wears a fitted white dress with cut-out details at the waist and a short, ruched skirt, complemented by a single orange strap and a decorative cord hanging from the hip. Its arms are covered with long, fingerless gloves, and the legs are clad in thigh-high stockings with orange and black accents, finished with white, high-heeled boots. The face is detailed with large, expressive eyes, a small nose, and a neutral mouth, giving it an anime-inspired look. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a color palette dominated by white, pink, and orange. The doll's proportions and attire suggest it is intended as a collectible or display figure rather than a traditional toy.
description: A stylized, anime-inspired doll with pink braided hair, a white cut-out dress, and high-heeled boots, featuring detailed facial features and modern accessories.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the twin braids, large bows, back of the dress, and the decorative cord hanging from the hip.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the side of the face, the layered hair braid, and the silhouette of the dress and boots.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's facial features, chest cut-outs, arm gloves, and the full design of the dress and boots.
description_view_3: Right profile view similar to the left, showing the opposite braid, side of the face, and the dress's side details.
attribute_clothing_style: Fitted white mini dress with side cut-outs and ruched skirt, accented by an orange strap and decorative cord, paired with long fingerless gloves, thigh-high black and orange stockings, and white high-heeled boots; the style is reminiscent of modern Japanese street fashion with anime influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended outward at shoulder height, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect; the pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly parted lips, wide open eyes, and relaxed eyebrows, conveying a calm and composed demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Long, light pink hair styled in two thick braids, each tied with a large bow, and a headband across the top.
